title: flow field 01
description: perlin noise flow field. each particle follows the gradient of a noise function, leaving a faint trail. run long enough and the field reveals its own topology.

title: cellular automaton
description: rule 110 — one of the simplest systems known to be capable of universal computation. emergent structure from a one-line rule.

title: reaction diffusion
description: gray-scott model. two virtual chemicals interact and diffuse across a grid. the parameters sit just at the edge of stability — shift them and the patterns collapse or explode.
